series_metadata.series_description: Documents submitted by unsuccessful architects, construction managers, engineering firms and other potential consultants. Includes, but not limited to, Statements of Qualifications, Technical Proposals, Question and Answer documents, Guaranteed Maximum Price Proposals, amendments and supplements and similar documents. Includes records for individual and multiple (statewide) projects. Names of firms considered for consultant projects, technical capability, proposals received, calculations, decisions opf the selection committee.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: unless converted electronic format ; Electronic
